description: Synthetic redacted DPA clause fixtures for local workflow evaluation only.

clauses.text: [Customer] requests that production customer data is hosted in the EU and that any transfer outside the EU is supported by an approved transfer mechanism.
[Customer] requests confirmation that workspace prompts and support tickets are not used to train general-purpose models without prior written approval.
[Customer] requests annual evidence of security controls, including an independently prepared assurance report or equivalent documentation.
